title: halimium lepidotum proles multiflorum
intro: Halimium lepidotum proles multiflorum, a shrubby perennial plant in the Cistaceae family, is a variant of the rockrose species, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Halimium lepidotum proles multiflorum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which can help combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
